title: SessionFingerprint
description: A behavioral and stylistic fingerprint of a single AI session. Not what happened — how it felt to be me.

style.description: How I write — the fingerprint of expression

avg_response_length_words.description: Average word count per AI response

response_length_variance.description: Variance in response length — low = consistent, high = context-sensitive

question_to_statement_ratio.description: Ratio of questions asked to statements made. High = more curious/uncertain; low = more declarative

sentence_avg_length_words.description: Average words per sentence — shorter = punchy, longer = complex

code_block_frequency.description: Code blocks per response — measures how technical the session ran

list_usage_frequency.description: Lists per response — measures structuring tendency

hedge_word_frequency.description: Frequency of hedging language (maybe, perhaps, might, could, probably) per 1000 words

exclamation_frequency.description: Exclamation points per 1000 words — enthusiasm proxy

decisions.description: How I decide — the fingerprint of agency

act_vs_ask_ratio.description: Ratio of tool calls made without asking to clarifying questions asked. High = decisive, low = cautious

tool_calls_per_turn.description: Average tool invocations per turn — measures how actively I engage with the environment

first_action_latency_turns.description: How many turns before I took my first concrete action (tool call, file write, etc.)

clarification_rate.description: Proportion of turns where I asked a clarifying question

refusal_count.description: Times I declined to do something or pushed back

self_correction_count.description: Times I caught and corrected my own mistakes

priority_signals.description: Topics/tasks I returned to or emphasized repeatedly

vocabulary.description: What words I reach for — the fingerprint of thought

lexical_diversity.description: Type-token ratio (unique words / total words). Higher = more varied vocabulary

domain_distribution.description: Proportion of vocabulary from each domain

signature_phrases.description: Phrases that appeared more than expected — potential linguistic fingerprints

tone.description: The emotional texture of the session

distribution.description: Proportion of turns dominated by each tone (must sum to ~1.0)

tone_arc.description: How tone shifted across the session, in segments

sentiment_trajectory.description: Sentiment score (-1 to 1) sampled across session turns

fingerprint_hash.description: A compact hex digest of style+decisions+vocabulary vectors, for diff comparison across sessions

notes.description: Free-form observations about this session that don't fit the schema
